name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-7
title: Break [rabbit] hook output into multiple lines for readability
description:
All [rabbit] hook messages (e.g. UserPromptSubmit policy refresh) are emitted as a single dense line. Example current output:

  🔄 ━━━ [rabbit] Policy refreshed — .claude/features/policy/philosophy.md .claude/features/policy/spec-rules.md .claude/features/policy/coding-rules.md ━━━ 🔄

This is hard to scan. Preferred format breaks each injected file onto its own line:

  🔄 ━━━ [rabbit] Policy refreshed
    · philosophy.md
    · spec-rules.md
    · coding-rules.md
  ━━━ 🔄

Apply consistently across all [rabbit] hook output — policy refresh, scope guard denials, override confirmations, and any other structured multi-item messages.
